Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Good work, Commander. We now have an AEW platform orbiting and two CAP fighters ready to respond to any aerial threat.

If you look at the Tactical Display, you can see that our AEW aircraft has detected two large surface contacts to the southwest. Since both of these contacts are emitting known US search radar types, they have been classified as hostile. Let's prep and launch a strike against these two ships.

The Vilnus carries a squadron of Ko-45 attack aircraft. Go ahead and select this type, choose the Anti-Ship Precision loadout, and then launch a flight of four. Note: each flight of aircraft can contain a max of four aircraft when launched from a carrier or airbase!
